raw_text: fernando rodriguez +34 608 5219568 martinez fernandorgueex@gmnai.com es profile dedicated aerospace engineering student with a major in aerospace vehicles at universidad politecnica de madrid. strong team working and leadership skills, enhanced while leading local university activities as well as being part of several class projects at technical university of madrid. motivated and hardworking person focused on further developing its formation. education aerospace engineering technical university of madrid and école polytechnique de montreal 2016 - 2023 aerospace engineering with a major in aerospace vehicles. baccalauréat ies drago 2013 - 2015 participated in several exchange programs in france. extra-curricular and working experience students representative universidad politécnica de madrid 2017 - 2019 head of the international and exchange students department. organized activities in the aerospace sector for international students. participated in several meetings defending the students rights. volunteering danhostel aarhus city 2018 managed and coordinated the international team. developed great communication and leadership abilities. member of aula airbus universidad politécnica de madrid 2021-now took part in different aeronautical research projects such as idea challenge or flight testing. intern in the research group in durability of materials and lapom école polytechnique de montreal 2022-2023 carried out a project on mechanical properties of inconel 625 superalloy produced by laser powder bed fusion, partnering with the company reaction dynamics. languages spanish: native level english: c1 level french: b2 level
